creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Switching virtual consoles or keyboard qualifiers such as CAPS LOCK, or NUM
LOCK, freezes my computer for a fraction of a seconds. This causes hard disk
and audio to stall and mute (if displaying text consoles) or make snarling
noises (if displaying X11).

I have a USB keyboard. dmesg below with angle brackets replaced by parentheses,
but first my kernel configuration:

##############################
$ cat /sys/i386/conf/MA7
include GENERIC
ident   MA7

nomakeoption DEBUG

options ALTQ
options ALTQ_CBQ
options ALTQ_RED
options ALTQ_RIO
options ALTQ_HFSC
options ALTQ_PRIQ

options INCLUDE_CONFIG_FILE

##############################
$ dmesg | tr '<>' '()'
